case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS ANTONE GREGORY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $947.50 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONE GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTONE GREGORY $947.50 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,029.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONE GREGORY

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-23-1992, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONE GREGORY
